name: Argosy Minerals Limited
description: Argosy Minerals Limited is an Australian mineral exploration company with a focus on lithium and other battery minerals. The company's flagship project is the Rincon Lithium Project located in the Salta Province of Argentina, within the world-renowned 'Lithium Triangle'. Argosy is focused on developing the Rincon Project to become a sustainable, high-quality producer of battery-grade lithium carbonate. Additionally, the company holds interest in the Tonopah Lithium Project in Nevada, USA.
